concepts.name: Basic Algebra
concepts.summary: Learn to solve equations using variables and fundamental operations.

concepts.name: Linear Algebra
concepts.summary: A study on vectors and matrices that extends basic algebra to solve systems of linear equations.

concepts.name: Calculus (Study of Rates/Integration)
concepts.summary: A branch of mathematics focused on the study of rates of change and accumulation using derivatives and integrals, often applied to understand continuous functions.

concepts.name: Probability Theory
concepts.summary: The mathematics of randomness and uncertainty.

concepts.name: Statistics in Machine Learning and Data Science
concepts.summary: Statistics is the study of data analysis, inference using probability, which depends on mathematical understanding.

concepts.name: Python Programming
concepts.summary: Python programming teaches how to write code in the Python language.

concepts.name: Machine Learning & AI Basics
concepts.summary: A subset of Artificial Intelligence that enables systems to learn from data, requiring foundational skills like linear algebra and calculus.

concepts.name: Deep Learning (or Deep Reinforcement Learning)
concepts.summary: This section explains the core principles and applications of deep learning, detailing how it uses multiple layers to process complex patterns. It also identifies key use cases for image recognition and natural language processing.

concepts.name: Computer Vision
concepts.summary: The ability of computers to interpret and understand visual information such as images and videos through machine learning. It is a key technology used in facial recognition, autonomous vehicles, and medical imaging.

concepts.name: Natural Language Processing (NLP)
concepts.summary: A subfield of artificial intelligence that enables computers to process, understand, and generate human language.

concepts.name: Basic arithmetic (Algebraic Foundation)
concepts.summary: The core subject of mathematics that teaches fundamental skills in addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division.
